note: The golden brief set for the two-plane eval harness (scripts/eval-runner.mjs + the visual rubric gate). Over-represents the THIN everyday-business verticals where generic-AI slop is the default failure and where the moat must prove itself. Run >=3 trials per brief, end-state; every failure becomes a new case. thinVertical=true ones get the looser coverage-confidence thresholds (ties to G1).

a sports + rehab physio clinic; book a session, meet the team, the conditions treated

a clean minimal nail + beauty studio; services, gallery, book now
a calming day spa; treatments, the space, gift vouchers, booking
